Mandatory.name: ConnectionURL
Mandatory.description: Connection URL#Connection URL for the user store

Mandatory.name: ConnectionName
Mandatory.description: Connection Name#This should be a DN (Distinguish Name) of a user with sufficient permissions to perform operations on users and groups in LDAP

Mandatory.name: ConnectionPassword
Mandatory.description: Connection Password#Password of the admin user#encrypt

Mandatory.name: UserSearchBase
Mandatory.description: User Search Base#DN of the context under which user entries are stored in LDAP

Mandatory.name: UserNameAttribute
Mandatory.description: Username Attribute#Attribute used for uniquely identifying a user entry. Users can be authenticated using their email address, uid and etc

Mandatory.name: UserNameSearchFilter
Mandatory.description: User Search Filter#Filtering criteria for searching a particular user entry

Mandatory.name: UserNameListFilter
Mandatory.description: User List Filter#Filtering criteria for listing all the user entries in LDAP

Mandatory.name: UserIDAttribute
Mandatory.description: User ID Attribute#Attribute used for uniquely identifying a user entry.

Mandatory.name: UserIdSearchFilter
Mandatory.description: User ID Search Filter#Filtering criteria for searching a particular user entry

Mandatory.name: GroupIdAttribute
Mandatory.description: Group Id Attribute#Attribute used to uniquely identify group

Optional.name: UserDNPattern
Optional.description: User DN Pattern#The patten for user's DN. It can be defined to improve the LDAP search

Optional.name: DisplayNameAttribute
Optional.description: Display name attribute#Attribute name to display as the Display Name

Optional.name: ReadGroups
Optional.description: Read Groups#Specifies whether groups should be read from LDAP

Optional.name: GroupSearchBase
Optional.description: Group Search Base#DN of the context under which user entries are stored in LDAP

Optional.name: GroupNameAttribute
Optional.description: Group Name Attribute#Attribute used for uniquely identifying a user entry

Optional.name: GroupNameSearchFilter
Optional.description: Group Search Filter#Filtering criteria for searching a particular group entry

Optional.name: GroupNameListFilter
Optional.description: Group List Filter#Filtering criteria for listing all the group entries in LDAP

Optional.name: RoleDNPattern
Optional.description: Group DN Pattern#The patten for groups's DN. It can be defined to improve the LDAP search

Optional.name: MembershipAttribute
Optional.description: Membership Attribute#Attribute used to define members of LDAP groups

Optional.name: BackLinksEnabled
Optional.description: Enable Back Links# Whether to allow attributes to be result from references to the object from other objects

Optional.name: Referral
Optional.description: Referral#Guides the requests to a domain controller in the correct domain

Optional.name: ReplaceEscapeCharactersAtUserLogin
Optional.description: Enable Escape Characters at User Login#Whether replace escape character when user login

Optional.name: LDAPInitialContextFactory
Optional.description: LDAP Initial Context Factory#The property to set LDAP Initial Context Factory

Optional.name: DateAndTimePattern
Optional.description: Date And Time Pattern#Patterns of Date and Time values are stored in the userstore separated by brackets

Optional.name: CaseInsensitiveUsername
Optional.description: Case Insensitive Username#Whether the username is case sensitive or not

Optional.name: UseCaseSensitiveUsernameForCacheKeys
Optional.description: Use Case Sensitive Username for Cache Keys#Whether case-sensitive username can be used as the cache key or not.

Advanced.name: PasswordHashMethod
Advanced.description: Password Hashing Algorithm#Password Hash method to use when storing user entries

Advanced.name: MultiAttributeSeparator
Advanced.description: Multiple Attribute Separator#This is the separator for multiple claim values

Advanced.name: MaxUserNameListLength
Advanced.description: Maximum User List Length#Maximum number of users retrieved at once

Advanced.name: MaxRoleNameListLength
Advanced.description: Maximum Role List Length#Maximum number of groups retrieved at once

Advanced.name: UserRolesCacheEnabled
Advanced.description: Enable User Role Cache#This is to indicate whether to cache the group list of a user

Advanced.name: ConnectionPoolingEnabled
Advanced.description: Enable LDAP Connection Pooling#Set this property to enable LDAP connection pooling.

Advanced.name: LDAPConnectionTimeout
Advanced.description: LDAP Connection Timeout#LDAP Connection Timeout

Advanced.name: ReadTimeout
Advanced.description: LDAP Read Timeout#Configure this to define the read timeout for LDAP operations

Advanced.name: RetryAttempts
Advanced.description: Retry Attempts#Number of retries for authentication in case ldap read timed out.

Advanced.name: CountRetrieverClass
Advanced.description: Count Implementation#Name of the class that implements the count functionality

Advanced.name: java.naming.ldap.attributes.binary
Advanced.description: LDAP binary attributes#Configure this to define the LDAP binary attributes seperated by a space. Ex:mpegVideo mySpecialKey

Advanced.name: ClaimOperationsSupported
Advanced.description: Claim Operations Supported#Whether the userstore supports claim read and write

Advanced.name: MembershipAttributeRange
Advanced.description: Membership Attribute Range#Number of maximum users of role returned by the LDAP

Advanced.name: UserCacheExpiryMilliseconds
Advanced.description: User Cache Expiry milliseconds#Configure the user cache expiry in milliseconds. Values  {0: expire immediately, -1: never expire, '': i.e. empty, system default}.

Advanced.name: UserDNCacheEnabled
Advanced.description: Enable User DN Cache#Enables the user cache. Default true, Unless set to false. Empty value is interpreted as true.

Advanced.name: StartTLSEnabled
Advanced.description: Enable StartTLS#Enable secure connection by using StartTLS extended operation in LDAP

Advanced.name: ConnectionRetryCount
Advanced.description: Connection Retry Count#Specifies connection retry times inorder to re-establish the connection on failure

Advanced.name: ConnectionRetryDelay
Advanced.description: Connection Retry Delay#Specifies waiting time in milliseconds inorder to establish the connection after couple of failure attempts.

Advanced.name: ImmutableAttributes
Advanced.description: Immutable Attributes#Comma-separated list of user store maintained immutable attributes

Advanced.name: TimestampAttributes
Advanced.description: Timestamp Attributes#Comma-separated list of user store attributes having the data type of Timestamp and may require a conversion when reading from/writing to user store

Advanced.name: GroupIDEnabled
Advanced.description: Enable Group Unique Id#Enable userstore managed groups

Advanced.name: GroupCreatedDateAttribute
Advanced.description: Group Created Date Attribute#Attribute used to store created date of the group

Advanced.name: GroupLastModifiedDateAttribute
Advanced.description: Group Last Modified Date Attribute#Attribute used to store the last modified date of the group
